# Aleksandr Shulgin (IShu)

> Full-cycle engineer — backend Python, LLM pipelines, automation, trading infrastructure. Takes a task in words, hands back a system that runs without him: code, infrastructure, 24/7 production. This site (shulgin.is-a.dev) is a portfolio/CV. The human-facing version is a React SPA; agents should prefer the markdown mirror below.

Key facts: 10+ production systems running 24/7 unattended; a Polymarket market-making system with a 13x latency gain and sub-50ms p99 order submission; 3.9M trades analyzed in edge research; machine-verified Lean 4 proofs merged into Google DeepMind's formal-conjectures repo; an evolutionary LLM pipeline that reproduced AlphaEvolve's SOTA numerical bound. Open to offers (freelance or full-time, remote, GMT+10).

## Content

- [Full portfolio as markdown](https://shulgin.is-a.dev/llms-full.txt): everything on the site — flagship trading system, formal math, 15+ projects with metrics, stack, contacts

## Live artifacts

- [GitHub](https://github.com/Sanexxxx777): open-source repos and merged contributions
- [pm2-cockpit](https://github.com/Sanexxxx777/pm2-cockpit): emergency process-control cockpit over Telegram, MIT
- [DeepMind formal-conjectures PR #4245](https://github.com/google-deepmind/formal-conjectures/pull/4245): merged Lean 4 proof (Erdos 1084)
- [erdos-openevolve](https://github.com/Sanexxxx777/erdos-openevolve): evolutionary search reproducing a SOTA bound, one-command verifier
